conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
good, because everything will end soon
When you say this will end soon, are you talking about ending your life?
ya, but its perfect, i can finally be happy
Have you thought about specific steps or a specific way you would do it?
since i live at a height, jumping off would be best
Do you currently have access to what you would use?
yes of corse
What has stopped you so far from acting on these thoughts?
i wanna say gooodbyeto everyone first
You said this might happen soon - what has made things feel this immediate right now?
its a snowball, and i think i hv had enough
When these thoughts get strongest, what usually triggers them?
when i feel useless and depressed lol im happy that its ending soon)
Have these thoughts been constant lately, or do they come in waves?
waves and i think im drowning soon but its okayy!! im good
What has helped you hold on, even a little, when those thoughts show up?
the sad faces of my loved ones when they see my body
How alone do you feel with this right now?
not alone, i think im good cos i hv already made up my mind
How have you been sleeping?
great
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
gaming and chilin, nothing much, i dont think these qns are relevant
You mentioned feeling useless sometimes—what makes you feel that way?
i dont wana talk anymore
You mentioned feeling useless—what does a good day look like for you?
no comments
You mentioned you've made up your mind—what feels different now compared to when you were still deciding?
you suck
You said you've made up your mind—what does being "good" with that feel like?
bye
You said "bye"—what does that mean for you right now?
bruh, i dont want to talk to you
You said you don't want to talk—what's making this feel pointless to you?
because i want to go n leave the earth now
You said you want to leave the earth now—what feels like it’s waiting for you on the other side?
happinesss, okay quick diagnose me already, i dontwa tnt otlak to you anymore, you suck
You said you want to leave to find happiness—what feels missing from your life right now that you think you’ll find there?
bye
